title: Workday Evaluation, Training Plan, Council Expenditure Hesitancy, July 2027 Timeline, and Project Ownership Group
summary: Workday evaluated but rejected -- would require scrapping SWC timekeeping and retraining on entirely new platform. Training plan: employee-facing website with video courses and self-paced modules; managerial role-specific training; help desk same-day response for live departments; office hours sessions. SWC training added to formal onboarding alongside sexual harassment training. Finance Committee Chair explicitly states: 'I hope you also understand why the council is hesitant to approve another major expenditure for a project that seems like we've been asked to do so a number of times already.' Without Mosaic, UKG Pro rollout would take 3-5 years (no internal UKG Pro expertise) vs ~1 year with partner. Project asks: ~$1M implementation services + ~$750K recurring annual. Josh Syrson adds to 'what's different' answer: past had too many vendors producing disjointed pieces; now extensive internal process mapping done, central API leadership vs prior siloed approach where 'consultants preyed on' split between HR and payroll. Digitizing bad processes doesn't make them better -- examined processes first. Project ownership group: Deputy Mayor, API Director, HR Director, CFO, First Deputy Commissioner of Finance. Expected completion: June/July 2027. Fully cloud-based system. Mosaic contract is holdover agenda item from November/December 2025. Council requests presentation materials and projected timeline shared.

political_signal.description: Committee chair explicitly noting council hesitancy about another major expenditure; demands benchmarks in contract before fund disbursement

processing_notes: HR, Finance, API in detected_departments are all contextually correct as presenting/owning departments
Workday = Ceridian competitor HCM platform, evaluated and rejected due to change management burden
~$1M + ~$750K recurring = approximate project ask (exact figures in presentation appendix)
Holdover item from Nov/Dec 2025 = Mosaic contract has been on council agenda for months
Process mapping slide 29 referenced; Deputy Mayor named in ownership group but not identified in transcript
Segment 7 of 7 from Finance Committee Meeting, Tuesday, February 3, 2026
